name: Fresh Corn Seafood Chowder
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Fresh corn, parboiled and removed from cob
1 1/2 cups Fresh shrimp, peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the bacon until crispy. Crumble it and set aside.
2. In a separate pot, add flour to the bacon fat and stir with a wire whisk.
3. Gradually add chicken broth and half & half to the mixture, stirring rapidly with a whisk. Cook for about 10 minutes.
4. In another pot, melt butter and sauté celery and onions until they are transparent.
5. Add crawfish tails and cook for about 5 minutes until they are cooked through.
6. Stir in the crab meat, shrimp, corn, seafood seasoning, salt, and pepper.
7. Combine this mixture with the milk mixture from step 3.
8. If the chowder is too thick, add more half & half to reach the desired consistency.
9. Sprinkle the crumbled bacon on top before serving.
